# Agent Brain Index (llms.txt)

## Knowledge Base
- [D&D 5e SRD](knowledge/domain/dnd_5e_srd.md): Review for game rules, spells, races, classes.
- [Strapi Reference](knowledge/backend/strapi/full_reference.md): Review for backend CMS structure and API.
- [LangChain Philosophy](knowledge/ai/langchain_philosophy.md): Understanding the framework.
- [LangChain Docs (Repo)](knowledge/ai/langchain_docs/): Full LangChain documentation repository.
- [Thinking in LangGraph](knowledge/ai/thinking_in_langgraph.md): Agentic architecture patterns.
- [LangGraph Docs (Repo)](knowledge/ai/langgraph_docs/): Full LangGraph documentation repository.
- [Vibe Coding](knowledge/ai/vibe_coding.md): AI-assisted development best practices.
- [System Architecture](knowledge/architecture/arch.md): High-level system design.

## Skills
- [D&D Rules](skills/dnd-rules/SKILL.md): Expert lookup for SRD.
- [CI/QA Gates](skills/ci-qa-gates/SKILL.md): Quality enforcement.
- [Daicer CLI](skills/daicer-cli/SKILL.md): Backend interaction.
- [CodeConcat](skills/codeconcat/SKILL.md): Code bundling.

## Rules
- [Agentic Architecture](rules/08-agentic-architecture.md): Mandatory design patterns.
